title: Drug Trade Overhaul
description: A complete rework of the drug dealing system, with new items, new routes and improved balancing.

changes.text: New methamphetamine production chain with 4 craftable stages
Drug runner job — transport packages between drop points for a cut
Drug dealer sell prices rebalanced based on server economy feedback
Drug stash props no longer clip through certain building floors
Removed the old cannabis system (replaced by new chain)

title: Police Tooling Patch
description: Quality-of-life improvements for police roles following community feedback.

changes.text: ANPR scanner added to Traffic Officer loadout
ARV callout range increased from 500u to 800u
Fixed dispatch notifications not clearing after incidents resolved
Handcuff animation no longer desyncs for the arrested player

title: Base Building Rules Update
description: New props, constraints and clearer enforcement of base-building guidelines.

changes.text: Two new fencing prop sets available in the Entities menu
Fading door minimum open time increased from 4s to 5s
Max fading doors per base reduced from 4 to 3
Kill-corridor detection now flags no-collide tunnel builds correctly
Removed particle emitter props due to server performance impact

title: Initial Launch
description: HazeRP goes live! Thank you to everyone who helped test during the closed beta.

changes.text: Core PoliceRP gamemode with UK-themed jobs and loadouts
NHS, Roadworker, and Civilian job trees
